intended_use: Automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to reference percentile data
intended_use_full: Automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric data may be compared to reference percentile data
target_condition: Brain structure and lesion volumetric assessment
ground_truth: Expert manual segmentations and repeated MRI scans of same subjects
other_metrics: Dice coefficient 80-90% for major subcortical structures, 75-85% for major cortical regions, >80% for lesion segmentations; mean percentage absolute volume difference 1-5% for subcortical structures; mean absolute lesion volume difference <0.25cc; mean percentage lesion absolute volume difference <2.5%
